creator: olivierd@FreeBSD.org
text:
Unfortunately, we (the Xfce team) can't resolve this issue, because it depends of devel/gvfs.

Furthermore, upgrade of gvfs (in 1.18.x branch) is not currently possible, due to version of devel/glib20 (2.36.3) In this branch GLib must be at least 2.37.0 [1].

pkgconf --modversion glib-2.0
2.36.3

[1] https://git.gnome.org/browse/gvfs/tree/configure.ac?id=1.18.0#n64
